Deinosuchus.Name: Deinosuchus
Deinosuchus.IsDino: This is not a dinosaur because it is from the crocodile / alligator lineage!
Deinosuchus.Location: United States (North Carolina, Montana, Texas, New Jersey), and Northern Mexico During The Late Cretaceous
Deinosuchus.Size: Adults have been found to be over 35 ft!
Deinosuchus.FunFact: Deinosuchus is an extinct genus of eusuchian, either an alligatoroid crocodilian or a stem-group crocodilian, which lived during the Late Cretaceous around 82 to 73 million years ago. The first remains were discovered in North Carolina
